title: The Craft of Storytelling
description:
This self-paced online storytelling course reveals the secrets behind the powerful tool that is storytelling. This four-week learning experience will equip you to tell stories your audiences will love. The power of storytelling is critical for captivating, educating, and influencing your audience whether in public speaking, social media, creative writing, or everyday real-life situations. 
 Telling great stories is not intuitive for most of us however, which is why so many people struggle with good storytelling. You can quickly unlock the art of storytelling and learn how to tell your own stories, including your personal story, using time-tested techniques that will keep your audience on the edge of their seats. 
 "The Craft of Storytelling" dives into storytelling tips such as: 
 
 Setting the scene 
 Building a dramatic arc 
 Empathizing with your audience 
 Eliminating rabbit trails 
 Locking the conflict 
 The "Ice Road Trucker" effect 
 Employing key delivery techniques 
 
 Taught in a fun and conversational way, "The Craft of Storytelling" draws from the instructor's experience telling stories in podcasts, radio, print, documentaries, at parties, and live on stage in front of hundreds of people. Join this free course and learn engaging storytelling techniques and develop communication skills. Become a better storyteller and share your story with the world.
